notes: Phase 4 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Destruction Warlock gear guide (anchor phase-4-tier-10 — this page has no separate Phase 5/Ruby Sanctum table, unlike the other two warlock specs; RS upgrades may not have been re-simmed for Destruction yet on the source page). Tier set: Sanctified Dark Coven line. Corrections: Icy Veins' own table mistakenly repeats the Helm item in both the Shoulders AND Chest rows (site error, see Affliction notes) — shoulder name inferred from the mage/priest "Shoulderpads" pattern; chest corrected to "Robe" by cross-referencing the Affliction Warlock page, which shows the same tier chest correctly. Enchants/gems shared by all three warlock specs.

items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — Icecrown Gunship Battle — Armory

items.source: The Ashen Verdict — reward from Path of Destruction

items.name: Ring of Rapid Ascent
items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — Icecrown Gunship Battle — Armory

enchants.name: Enchant Cloak — Greater Speed
enchants.source: Enchanting (Lightweave Embroidery for tailors; Springy Arachnoweave for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Superior Spellpower

enchants.name: Enchant Boots — Tuskarr's Vitality

enchants.name: Enchant Staff — Greater Spellpower
enchants.source: Enchanting (staff); Enchant Weapon — Mighty Spellpower for main-hand

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 spellpower, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare)
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit), Rigid King's Amber for socket bonus
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
